basics.name: Adeel Akhtar
basics.label: Assistant Professor, Mechanical and Industrial Engineering, NJIT
basics.summary: Adeel Akhtar is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Mechanical and Industrial Engineering at the New Jersey Institute of Technology. His research focuses on nonlinear control, geometric control, hybrid systems, cyber-physical systems, and mobile and aerial robotics.

location.address: 323 Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. Blvd.

work.name: New Jersey Institute of Technology

highlights: Research in nonlinear control, geometric control, hybrid systems, and robotics

work.name: University of Toronto Institute for Aerospace Studies / Queen's University / York University
work.summary: Postdoctoral research in geometric control and control of mechanical systems on Lie groups.

courses: Thesis: Nonlinear and geometric control of rigid body vehicles
Thesis: Dynamic path following controllers for planar mobile robots

courses: Thesis: Design, implementation, and real-time digital control of a cart-mounted inverted pendulum
